# BuzzSkito Mosquito & Tick Control
> Professional mosquito and tick barrier spray services for residential properties across the Greater Toronto Area (GTA), Ontario, Canada. Health Canada-approved formula, safe for kids and pets in 30 minutes.

## Company Info
- Name: BuzzSkito Mosquito & Tick Control
- Phone: (289) 216-5030
- Email: support@buzzskito.ca
- Website: https://buzzskito.ca
- Service Area: Mississauga, Toronto, Brampton, Oakville, Burlington, Hamilton, Vaughan, Markham, Richmond Hill, and 10+ more GTA cities
- Google Reviews: 126 five-star reviews (5.0 average)
- Season: May through September

## Services
- Mosquito barrier spray (from $99/treatment)
- Tick barrier spray (from $99/treatment)
- Season packages: Basic ($549, 5 treatments), Standard ($994, 10 treatments), Exclusive ($2,049, 20+ treatments)
- Tick add-on: $497 when bundled with mosquito plan ($597 standalone)
- Commercial mosquito control for restaurants, golf courses, event venues
- Wedding and outdoor event mosquito treatment

## Differentiators
- No contracts, no cancellation fees
- Rain-back guarantee (free re-treatment if rain within 1 hour)
- 100% satisfaction guarantee
- Transparent pricing (published on website)
- SMS notifications before and after every visit
- Health Canada-approved, water-based formula
- Licensed technicians
